Short Description: Braised Short Rib with a Red Wine Reduction and Roasted Mushrooms and Roasted Pearl Onions over Wild Rice
Long Description: Slow-braised short rib finished with a rich red wine reduction, served with roasted mushrooms and roasted pearl onions over wild rice for a classic, deeply savory dish with an elegant, steakhouse-inspired finish.

Short Description: Peri Peri Chicken with a Peri Peri Glaze and House White Sauce with Fire Roasted Sweet Corn and Saffron Roasted Cauliflower over Turmeric Rice
Long Description: Bold peri peri chicken finished with a house white sauce and peri peri glaze, served with fire roasted sweet corn and saffron roasted cauliflower over turmeric rice for a vibrant, layered plate with a warm and creamy finish.

Short Description: Seared Steak with a Teriyaki Reduction and Charred Zucchini and Roasted Rainbow Carrots over Jasmine Rice
Long Description: Seared steak finished with a rich teriyaki reduction, served with charred zucchini and roasted rainbow carrots over jasmine rice for a savory, umami-forward plate with a clean, polished finish.

Short Description: Garlic Herb Shrimp with a Lemon Garlic Butter Emulsion and Charred Broccolini and Roasted Red Peppers over Herb Roasted Baby Potatoes
Long Description: Tender garlic herb shrimp finished with a lemon garlic butter emulsion, served with charred broccolini and roasted red peppers over herb roasted baby potatoes for a bright, buttery seafood plate with a refined finish.

Short Description: Collagen Rich Chicken Bone Broth with Turmeric and Coconut Milk
Long Description: Our signature high protein chicken bone broth slow-simmered for 24 hours, finished with turmeric and coconut milk for a rich, warming broth with anti-inflammatory benefits and a smooth, velvety finish.

Short Description: Tiramisu chia pudding with sweet tiramisu-style cream topped with Biscoff cookie crumble
Long Description: Creamy vanilla chia pudding layered with a lightly sweet tiramisu-style cream, finished with a Biscoff cookie crumble layer for a rich, dessert-inspired treat with the perfect crunch.
